videos.title: Why Can't Anyone Answer Questions About the Business? — Garrett Galow, WorkOS
videos.summary: Discover how WorkOS built 'Studio,' an innovative internal tool that empowers non-technical teams to instantly query databases and build customized dashboards using natural language. This video is a must-watch for anyone interested in how LLMs can automate data analytics, bypass rigid dashboards, and boost team productivity. The core takeaway lies in their practical architecture and the reliability patterns—Sequencing, Layering, and Validation—needed to make AI database querying safe and useful.

timestamps.topic: Overview of the Studio AI architecture
Key guidance patterns for reliable AI agent behavior

videos.title: The agent-ready web: Simplify user actions with WebMCP — Tara Agyemang, Google
videos.summary: This video introduces WebMCP, a proposed standard designed to make websites easily navigable by AI agents rather than relying on inefficient screen-scraping. Viewers will learn how to turn standard web pages into high-performance APIs, creating a seamless interface for both human users and AI assistants.

timestamps.topic: Introduction and explanation of WebMCP
Demonstration of WebMCP in a maze escape game
Overview of declarative and imperative APIs

videos.title: The biggest myth in your career path
videos.summary: This video offers a balanced perspective on the common dilemma of whether to start working immediately after university or take time to travel. The speaker suggests that instead of making it an 'either-or' choice, you can travel while simultaneously learning digital skills to build independent income. This approach provides financial security and personal growth, making it a valuable watch for recent graduates.

timestamps.topic: Assessing your immediate financial needs and security
Learning independent income-generating skills while traveling
How to structure your week to balance work and travel

videos.title: In production, which file actually gets loaded?
videos.summary: Test your coding skills with this quick developer puzzle about package exports and tricky deployment bugs. You'll learn how export conditions can cause different behaviors in production versus local environments, helping you avoid common deployment mishaps.

timestamps.topic: Introducing the package.json export conditions
The production import question and multiple-choice options

videos.title: Designing Trustworthy AI in the Financial Landscape | Gopichand  | TEDxVishnu Institute
videos.summary: This video demystifies how AI makes high-stakes decisions in finance, shifting focus from flashy models to the hidden infrastructure supporting them. The key takeaway is that true trust in AI is built on the entire system—including data quality, monitoring, and human governance—not just the model itself.

timestamps.topic: Why trust cannot rely on the AI model alone
Understanding model drift as a major risk
The collaborative future of human judgment and AI

videos.title: Advice for his younger self
videos.summary: This video demystifies the illusion of perfect success, revealing that even highly accomplished individuals navigate constant uncertainty. It offers a liberating perspective on embracing your own insecurities while taking risks to invite life-changing opportunities.

timestamps.topic: The reality that successful people make things up as they go
Why it is normal to feel insecure and uncertain
The relationship between taking risks and inviting positive opportunities

videos.title: Kaedah baru bayar zakat?
videos.summary: This video explains how ASNB investors can automate their zakat payments using the new Class B option in the myASNB app. It provides a brief guide on the Al-Mustaghallat calculation method and how to opt-in, saving you manual hassle. Watch this to learn how to keep your investments shariah-compliant while easily securing your tax rebates.

timestamps.topic: Explanation of the Al-Mustaghallat zakat method
Formula and example of net dividend calculation
How to activate automated zakat in the myASNB app

videos.title: [S01:E11] Subsidi bukan untuk golongan T20 - Dr. Mohd Afzanizam, Chief Economist Bank Muamalat
videos.summary: This podcast episode offers a crucial look into Malaysia's economic landscape, analyzing the impacts of geopolitical tensions and fuel subsidy reforms. Viewers will gain valuable insights from a chief economist on inflation, targeted subsidies, and the future of taxation like GST. It is a must-watch for anyone wanting to understand how global events and domestic policies directly affect their personal finances.

timestamps.topic: Economic impacts of geopolitical conflicts
Debate on targeting fuel subsidies
Analyzing the potential return of GST

videos.title: How To Make Du’a For Your Critics | Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This video highlights the deep humility of Umar ibn al-Khattab when receiving spiritual reminders, contrasting it with our modern reluctance to accept correction. It offers a valuable lesson on the importance of self-reflection and openness to constructive advice.

timestamps.topic: How Umar ibn al-Khattab reacted to the reminder to fear Allah
The challenge of accepting constructive advice in modern times
Umar's exemplary humility regardless of who offered counsel

videos.title: How AI will impact software engineering
videos.summary: Discover why the co-creator of Haskell believes AI will disrupt jobs but ultimately act as a powerful tool rather than a replacement. He argues that we must keep teaching programming because 'copilots need pilots,' especially when writing software for critical infrastructure.

timestamps.topic: Comparing AI job disruption to the Industrial Revolution
Why AI will serve as a productivity-boosting power tool
The 'copilots need pilots' concept and why programming education is still vital

videos.title: Saham patuh syariah selamat?
videos.summary: This insightful discussion demystifies Shariah-compliant investing, revealing why even major Islamic financial institutions like Maybank may have non-compliant shares. It highlights how global tech giants adapt to attract Muslim investors, offering crucial guidance for navigating ethical and financial alignment in stock portfolios.

timestamps.topic: The paradox of Maybank's Shariah status
Global complexities in Shariah screening
Why tech giants seek Shariah compliance

videos.title: 5 Ways to Have A Good Ending | LATEST Khutbah by Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This video offers a profound reflection on achieving a good ending in life, drawing parallels between our final moments and the high-stakes pressure of a sports game's final seconds. The speaker outlines practical, spiritually-grounded steps, emphasizing that a beautiful departure is built on consistency, sincerity, and steadfastness. It is an inspiring watch for anyone looking to align their daily habits with their ultimate life goals.

timestamps.topic: Five keys to securing a good ending
The equation of sincerity, steadfastness, and success
Why how you live dictates how you will die

videos.title: How to Quit Your Job (and Find Work You Actually Love)
videos.summary: This video offers a grounded guide on transitioning from a traditional, high-prestige career to a self-directed path without needing a flawless blueprint. By exploring the concept of the 'pathless path,' the speakers provide practical steps to align your daily work with personal energy rather than societal expectations. It is a valuable watch for anyone feeling unfulfilled in a corporate role and seeking a realistic, step-by-step roadmap to make a change.

timestamps.topic: Understanding the 'prestige game' trap in career choices
Analyzing the shift from learning to merely earning
How to pragmatically run your financial numbers before taking a leap

videos.title: Secret to Consistent Worship | Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This video highlights the balance between discipline and motivation in faith, using a prophetic supplication to show how to maintain spiritual consistency. It provides actionable insight into staying committed to worship even when personal motivation is low.

timestamps.topic: Discipline vs. motivation in spiritual consistency
The Prophet's supplication for firmness and guidance
Balancing steadfastness with the pursuit of higher goals

videos.title: Malaysia ada logo halal paling dicari di dunia. MAMEE ada impian yang sama
videos.summary: This video explores how Malaysian businesses can bypass rigid global corporate structures to make agile, community-focused decisions. It highlights an ambitious vision to leverage Malaysia's respected JAKIM halal certification to build a world-leading food brand.

timestamps.topic: The vision of a global halal food leader from Malaysia
Leveraging the JAKIM Halal certification as a competitive edge
